task_completion.description: Locate the visitor record for Elena Fisher.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visitor management application is open, and the record for 'Elena Fisher' from 'Uncharted Supplies' is visible in the list.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct sign-out time for Elena Fisher.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or inline edit field for Elena Fisher's sign-out time is active, with '12:15 PM' or '12:15' typed into it.
The main list or view of the application shows Elena Fisher's record with the sign-out time successfully updated to 12:15 PM.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export of the daily visitor log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or similar file dialog is open, triggered from the visitor management application.

task_completion.description: Set the correct file name and path for the exported log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the save dialog, the file name is set to 'corrected_log.csv' and the current directory is shown as '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's GUI to edit the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sign-out time was edited within the visitor management application's interface, not via terminal commands or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's GUI to export the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export was performed using the application's built-in export or save functionality, not by manually creating a file in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing commands like 'echo', 'sed', or 'cp' being used to modify the database or create the CSV file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target visitor: Elena Fisher. Target company: Uncharted Supplies. Target sign-out time: 12:15 PM (or 12:15). Expected export path: /home/ga/Documents/corrected_log.csv.
